usage: report_ports [-help] [-include_pins] [-pins <port_name_list>] [-tcl_list] [-type {input source_insertion insertion clock_root uncertainty arrival required external clk_arrival port_cap fanout_load fanout_load_limit drive_resistance drive_cell slew_time slew_limit constant external_detail drive_resistance_detail}] [-view <view_name>] [> <filename[.gz]>] [>> <filename[.gz]>]

options.name: -include_pins
options.description: Reports timing constraints on instance pins, as well as on ports

options.name: -pins
options.description: Specifies the pins or ports to be reported

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Produces the report in Tcl list format instead of a tabular format

options.name: -type
options.description: {input source_insertion insertion clock_root uncertainty arrival required external clk_arrival port_cap fanout_load fanout_load_limit drive_resistance drive_cell slew_time slew_limit constant external_detail drive_resistance_detail} Specifies the constraints to be reported

options.name: -view
options.description: Specifies the view name (string, optional) > <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to the specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to the specified file
